channel.title: Azure SQL Managed Instance on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure SQL Managed Instance on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure SQL update for early-May 2026
item.description:
Azure SQL added a public preview update in early May 2026 for Business Critical Azure SQL Managed Instance. The change lets you right-size memory to improve performance without overprovisioning.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Public Preview: Azure SQL Managed Instance change event streaming
item.description:
Azure SQL Managed Instance now supports public preview of change event streaming (CES), which streams row-level inserts, updates, and deletes to Azure Event Hubs in near real time. Events are published as transactions commit to reduce latency.

  • Source: Azure Updates
